arts.ttl: Joshua Zirkzee sends Manchester United fans message after crucial penalty miss
arts.sum: Dutch forward’s pivotal error in the shootout condemned holders to fifth round exit from FA Cup

arts.ttl: Man Utd 1-1 Fulham (AET 3-4 pens): Player ratings as Red Devils crash out of FA Cup
arts.sum: Rodrigo Muniz flicked on Andreas Pereira's corner, with Calvin Bassey on hand to react quicker than Noussair Mazraoui, glancing the ball beyond the outstretched right hand of Andre Onana to give Fulham the lead. Neither side were able to settle the game in 90 minutes, despite United substitute Chido Obi going close, and Leno and Onana were on hand to make smart saves from Garnacho, Emile Smith Rowe and Ryan Sessegnon in extra-time.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains shock Manchester United penalty decision and drops striker hint
arts.sum: Order of the Red Devils’ penalty takers raised eyebrows after Fulham shootout defeat in FA Cup

arts.ttl: Amorim responds to Rooney :'Easy to be a pundit'
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim responded to Wayne Rooney's suggestion that he's "naive" to say his goal at Manchester United is to win the Premier League by telling the former club captain that it's "easy" to be a pundit.

arts.ttl: 'Agonising and lonely' - Geyse expresses unhappiness after Man Utd return
arts.sum: Manchester United's Brazil forward Geyse has said she finds it "agonising and lonely" staying somewhere she is not happy.

arts.ttl: Manchester United handed new injury scare against Fulham as Real Sociedad and Arsenal tests loom
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim’s selection issues mount ahead of Europa League last-16 first-leg clash in Spain

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reveals Man Utd's immediate focus after dramatic FA Cup exit
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim wants to quickly move on from Man Utd's latest disappointment in the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Every word from Ruben Amorim post-match press conference Man Utd v Fulham
arts.sum: “It's always hard because you always have the cups when the league is not going in the right direction, but we need to focus on the big goal, that is improving the team, trying to imagine how we are going to improve the team, not just in this moment, in this season, for the next season. So, I think the first step is to create situations.

arts.ttl: Rooney calls Amorim 'naive' for saying Man Utd want Premier League title
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is called "naive" by Wayne Rooney after the Portuguese said Manchester United want to win the Premier League title.

arts.ttl: Joshua Zirkzee releases 12-word statement after Man United FA Cup heartbreak vs Fulham
arts.sum: Manchester United centre-forward Joshua Zirkzee missed the decisive penalty as Fulham progressed to the quarter-finals with a 4-3 shootout win
